---
title: "Curriculum vitæ"
listing: 
  - id: education-en
    template: ../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../data/cv/education.yml
    template-params:
      type: education
      lang: en
  - id: experience-en
    template: ../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../data/cv/experience.yml
    template-params:
      type: experience
      lang: en
  - id: education-fr
    template: ../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../data/cv/education.yml
    template-params:
      type: education
      lang: fr
  - id: experience-fr
    template: ../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../data/cv/experience.yml
    template-params:
      type: experience
      lang: fr
---

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

## Academic and Research experience

::: {#experience-en}
:::

## Education and Diploma
::: {#education-en}
:::

::: {#experience-fr style="display:none;"}
:::

::: {#education-fr style="display:none;"}
:::

:::


::: {.content-visible when-profile="fr"}

## Parcours académique et expérience de recherche
::: {#experience-fr}
:::

## Formation et diplômes

::: {#education-fr}
:::

::: {#experience-en style="display:none;"}
:::

::: {#education-en style="display:none;"}
:::

:::
